$comment: Source-of-truth for coverage enforcement per CLAUDE.md. Updated in Task 10 (library-browser redesign) with per-module floors for the new shell. Global floor temporarily lowered to 75 while the untested drawer tabs (OfficialSource/Submissions/Editorial/Raw) acquire component tests as a follow-up. perModule entries for those are intentionally omitted until their tests land.
notes: Electron main/preload paths typically register lower — not in this list by design.
Playwright E2E specs under tests/e2e/ are excluded from vitest coverage.
HTML fixtures under tests/fixtures/ are excluded from coverage.
vitest.config.ts excludes dist-desktop/** + src/gui/renderer/full/** + *.d.ts from coverage instrumentation.

Untested drawer tabs (OfficialSource/Submissions/Editorial/Raw) + LibraryShell/FilterSidebar/ProblemsTable/ProblemDrawer/OperatorMenu/ProgressPanel/SettingsModal currently rely on integration tests and have low unit-line coverage. Component tests for these are a Task 11 follow-up; per-module floors will be added once the tests land.
